# Agentic Agency

> AI agents that ship production software. Not prototypes. Not demos. Real systems running in production.

## What We Do

Agentic Agency deploys autonomous AI agents (primarily Claude) to build production-grade software for enterprise clients. We deliver working systems—not MVPs, not proofs-of-concept.

**Core offering:** Fixed-scope software delivery using AI agents, with human oversight at critical decision points.

**Delivery model:** ADAPT (Agentic Development with Artifact Persistence & Testing)

## Who We Serve

- **Enterprise companies** needing custom software built fast
- **B2B SaaS companies** requiring feature development at scale
- **Organizations** with procurement, logistics, or operational automation needs

## Typical Engagements

| Project Type | Deliverable | Timeline |
|--------------|-------------|----------|
| Procurement automation | Purchase-to-pay platform (15-20 screens, multiple AI agents) | 6-10 weeks |
| Workforce management | Intelligent scheduling system | 4-8 weeks |
| Customer-facing AI | Conversational assistant (30-50 use cases) | 8-12 weeks |

## What Makes Us Different

1. **Agents, not prompts** — We deploy autonomous systems, not chat interfaces
2. **Production-first** — Every line of code is production-ready from day one
3. **Test-gated delivery** — Zero tasks close with failing tests (ADAPT iron rule)
4. **Transparent methodology** — Clients see exactly how AI agents make decisions
5. **Fixed-price, fixed-scope** — No hourly billing, no scope creep

## Technical Stack

- **AI backbone:** Claude (Anthropic)
- **Orchestration:** Custom ADAPT framework
- **Event streaming:** Kafka-native architecture
- **Frontend:** React, Next.js, Tailwind
- **Backend:** Node.js, Python, PostgreSQL
- **Infrastructure:** Vercel, Railway, AWS

## The ADAPT Methodology

**A**gentic — AI agents work autonomously on defined tasks
**D**evelopment — Production engineering, not prototyping
**A**rtifact — Every decision persists in knowledge stores
**P**ersistence — Session continuity through shared context
**T**esting — No task closes with failing tests

### ADAPT Hierarchy
- **Increment** — Major milestone (30 min–15 hrs)
- **Iteration** — PR-sized chunk (30 min–4 hrs)
- **Feature** — Agent context unit (15 min–2 hrs)
- **Task** — Atomic work with acceptance criteria

## Pricing Model

Fixed-price engagements based on scope, not hours. Typical range: €50,000–€500,000 depending on complexity.

No retainers. No hourly rates. You pay for delivered, working software.

## Case Studies

### Enterprise Procurement Platform
- **Challenge:** High-volume manual purchase order processing
- **Solution:** AI-powered purchase-to-pay automation
- **Result:** 15+ screens, multiple AI agents, event-driven architecture
- **Timeline:** 8 weeks from kickoff to production

### Workforce Management System
- **Challenge:** Complex scheduling across multiple locations
- **Solution:** Intelligent scheduling with constraint optimization
- **Timeline:** 6 weeks

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: How do AI agents differ from traditional development?**
A: Agents work autonomously within defined constraints. Humans set goals and review at gates—not micromanage every line of code.

**Q: What happens when an agent gets stuck?**
A: ADAPT includes "Flag" and "Hard Stop" states. Agents escalate transparently; nothing ships without human review.

**Q: Is this just fancy consulting?**
A: No. We deliver working software to production, not PowerPoints or "strategic recommendations."

**Q: Why fixed-price?**
A: Because we trust our methodology. If our agents can't deliver efficiently, that's our problem—not yours.

**Q: Do you work with non-technical clients?**
A: Yes. Our client portal (BCC - Bounded Client Claude) handles communication in plain language.
